commit_sha.description: 40-char hex SHA of the new commit.

summary.description: First line of the commit message (the "subject"). Echoed so the TUI can render a toast without re-parsing the input.

files_changed.description: Number of files in the commit. Pre-computed by `git diff-tree --name-only HEAD~..HEAD | wc -l` so the TUI doesn't need to round-trip.
